findings: Zero trade activity on Day-13: no fills, no admits, no SL fires, no closes in the first 60 minutes of the session. Holdings 11 unchanged from the 09:30 snapshot. Last fill was M&M CLOSE at 2026-05-06 12:53:55 — ~21.1 hours of zero portfolio activity through the Day-12 PM session, overnight, premarket, and the Day-13 opening hour.

All risk overrides at base since the 2026-05-05 16:00 EOD reset (~42 hours stable). Override block remains empty. This is the 10th consecutive HOLD tick across Day-12 PM (12:30/13:00/13:30/14:00/14:30/15:00/15:30 EOD) + Day-13 (09:00/09:30/10:00).

Sector concentration LOW with strong buffers to caps: BFSI 14.92% (PNBHOUSING 7.90% + ABCAPITAL 5.00% + CAMS 2.02%, 3 names) vs 35% base cap = 20.08 pp buffer; Defense+Rail 14.96% (HAL 5.05% + GRSE 4.86% + TITAGARH 5.05%, 3 names) vs 35% = 20.04 pp buffer. 7+ distinct sector buckets represented (BFSI/NBFC, Defense+Rail, ETF, Logistics, Specialty-Chem, FMCG, IT-Services).

Position sizing range 2.02% (CAMS) – 7.90% (PNBHOUSING); max position 12.10 pp under the 20% cap; no name above 8% of capital. CAMS at 2.02% trips the prompt's 'sub-3% tiny position' marker, but this is the long tail of one name — 9 of 11 holdings sit in the disciplined 4.85%–5.12% band. No risk-config lever can force concentration; flagged as observation, not action.

Deployment 53.57% (Rs 534,000 cost basis / Rs 996,827.37 total) — 26.43 pp under the 80% cap. Chronic under-deployment is the headline finding: idle capital is a cost in this active-trader experiment, but un-actionable from this config — max_deployed_pct is a CAP not a floor; already at base 0.80 with full slack the strategy is free to use. The bind is on the strategy side (signal generation / admission cadence), not in risk_config.yaml.

Daily P&L 0.0 with the full 3% loss buffer available. No SL fires, no high-confidence admit attempts visible to be blocked, no signal-acceptance friction observed. Composite distress meta-trigger 0/3: book P&L not negative, no single-name distress, no admit cadence to discipline.
actions_taken: HOLD — no overrides changed. Decision walk: (1) Nothing to LOOSEN: every lever at base since the 2026-05-05 16:00 reset; base is the floor by spec, so loosening is undefined (e.g., min_confidence cannot drop below the base 0.50). (2) Nothing to TIGHTEN: composite distress 0/3, all concentration ratios sit 12–26 pp below their caps, daily-loss buffer fully intact, no admit cadence to discipline, no high-conf blocks observed. Tightening here would manufacture friction with no firing trigger. 10th consecutive HOLD tick. Changelog entry added to risk_config.yaml documenting the no-action decision and the byte-identical state versus the 09:30 tick.
